summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Momentum Recap page final polish refinements (iteration 216). All backend API tests (20/20) and frontend UI tests passed. Key validations: personalized hero text naming Emory, conversational biggest_shift format, urgency_note on top priority, varied secondary action phrasing, renamed insight title, visual styling (5px priority border, 2px momentum border, correct padding).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final polish refinements testing complete. All requirements verified: 1) Hero names specific school (Emory University), 2) Biggest shift uses conversational format ('has gone quiet (9 days)'), 3) Top priority has urgency_note field, 4) Top priority reason includes timeframe, 5) Secondary actions use different phrasing (Stanford: 'Follow up', Florida: 'Keep pushing'), 6) Momentum action_guidance varies per item (Stanford: 'Keep the conversation active this week', Florida: 'Follow up within 48 hours', UCLA: 'Send your first follow-up within 48 hours'), 7) Insight title is 'What's driving your pipeline right now', 8) Priority cards have 5px border + 20px padding, 9) Momentum cards have 2px border + 10px 12px padding + lighter background. All navigation works (back button, priority clicks, momentum clicks). Mobile responsive at 390px.

backend_api_final_polish: recap_hero names specific school: 'Your pipeline is improving, but Emory University requires immediate attention.'
biggest_shift uses conversational format: 'Emory University has gone quiet (9 days)'
Top priority has urgency_note: 'This is your most important action right now'
Top priority reason includes timeframe: 'No activity for 9 days — re-engage within 24–48 hours'
Secondary actions use DIFFERENT phrasing (Stanford: 'Follow up', Florida: 'Keep pushing')
Secondary reasons are unique (Stanford: 'Campus visit completed — keep the conversation active this week', Florida: 'Send your next follow-up within 48 hours')
Momentum action_guidance varies: Stanford='Keep the conversation active this week', Florida='Follow up within 48 hours', UCLA='Send your first follow-up within 48 hours'
frontend_visual_styling: Priority cards: 5px left border, 20px padding, white background, box-shadow
Momentum cards: 2px left border, 10px 12px padding, rgba(255,255,255,0.5) background
Urgency note renders in red/colored text below top priority reason
Insight section title: 'What's driving your pipeline right now' (not 'INSIGHT')
frontend_content_verification: No repeated identical phrasing across secondary action cards
All momentum items show varied action_guidance
Hero section displays personalized school name
mobile_responsiveness: All sections render correctly at 390px width
Hero, biggest_shift, urgency_note, priority section, momentum section, AI summary all visible
Back button visible and functional on mobile
